meta.description: XBRL taxonomy namespaces commonly present in SEC company facts (non-exhaustive).

taxonomies.label: Document and Entity Information
taxonomies.notes: Entity identifiers, document period end, shares outstanding context, etc.

taxonomies.label: IFRS Taxonomy
taxonomies.notes: Used by some foreign private issuers and dual reporters.

taxonomies.label: SEC Reporting Taxonomy
taxonomies.notes: Often used for segment, revenue disaggregation, and other supplemental disclosures.

taxonomies.label: SEC Investment Taxonomy
taxonomies.notes: Registered investment companies and similar filers.
